mapper.sql: id, message_id, message_data, status, retry_count, next_retry_time, create_time, update_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO mcp_message_log (message_id, message_data, status, retry_count, next_retry_time, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{messageId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{messageData, jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, #{status, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{retryCount, jdbcType=INTEGER}, IFNULL(#{nextRetryTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, NOW()), NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE mcp_message_log SET status = #{status, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, update_time = NOW() WHERE message_id = #{messageId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND status != 'SUCCESS'

UPDATE mcp_message_log SET retry_count = #{retryCount, jdbcType=INTEGER}, next_retry_time = #{nextRetryTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, status = 'FAIL', update_time = NOW() WHERE message_id = #{messageId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND status != 'SUCCESS'
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM mcp_message_log WHERE status IN ('WAIT', 'FAIL') AND next_retry_time <= NOW() AND retry_count < 3 ORDER BY create_time ASC LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM mcp_message_log WHERE status = 'SUCCESS' AND update_time < #{beforeTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}
